flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Greenfield Community College fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (22.9% → 18.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Greenfield Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Greenfield Community College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.4k).
